iti61:1.3:
"Tīṇimāni, bhikkhave, cakkhūni. Katamāni tīṇi? Maṁsacakkhu, dibbacakkhu, paññācakkhu – imāni kho, bhikkhave, tīṇi cakkhūnī"ti. Etamatthaṁ bhagavā avoca. Tatthetaṁ iti vuccati:
"Maṁsacakkhu dibbacakkhu,
paññācakkhu anuttaraṁ;
Etāni tīṇi cakkhūni,
akkhāsi purisuttamo.
iti61:1.5:
Ayampi attho vutto bhagavatā, iti me sutanti.
Dutiyaṁ.
